dialogue.speaker: DR. THOMPSON
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of DR. THOMPSON, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: NURSE VALENCIA
dialogue.line: "Stable, doctor. The patient's vitals are looking good."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of DR. THOMPSON, his eyes fixed on the clipboard as he speaks.

dialogue.speaker: DR. THOMPSON
dialogue.line: "Excellent. Let's take a look at the scans and see how the injury is healing."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of NURSE VALENCIA, a gentle smile on her face as she speaks.

dialogue.speaker: JAXON REED
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of JAXON REED, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: NURSE VALENCIA
dialogue.line: "You were in an accident, Jaxon. You're safe now."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of JAXON REED, confusion etched on his face as he tries to remember.

dialogue.speaker: JAXON REED
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of NURSE VALENCIA, her hand gently stroking JAXON REED's arm as she speaks.

dialogue.speaker: DR. THOMPSON
dialogue.line: "Don't worry, Jaxon. You've been through a lot. We'll get you back on your feet in no time."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of JAXON REED, his eyes squinting in concentration as he tries to recall.

dialogue.speaker: JAXON REED
dialogue.line: "I had a dream...I was driving, and then...and then something happened."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of JAXON REED, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: NURSE VALENCIA
dialogue.line: "Try to relax, Jaxon. You're safe here."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of JAXON REED, his eyes wide with fear as he recounts the dream.

dialogue.speaker: DR. THOMPSON
dialogue.line: "We'll do some more tests in the morning, and we'll get to the bottom of this."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of NURSE VALENCIA, her voice soothing as she speaks.

dialogue.speaker: JAXON REED
dialogue.visual_cue: Over-the-shoulder shot of DR. THOMPSON, his eyes fixed on Jaxon's face as he speaks.
